title: Meta-tags Gem Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using the Meta-tags gem in Rails applications.

commands.description: Add meta-tags to a Rails view
commands.scenario: Add meta-tags to a Rails view

commands.description: Set title and description in a controller
commands.scenario: Set title and description in a controller

commands.description: Set default meta-tags in application layout
commands.scenario: Set default meta-tags in application layout

commands.command: set_meta_tags og: { title: 'Title', type: 'website', url: request.url }

# config/initializers/meta_tags.rb
MetaTags.configure do |c|
  c.title_limit = 70
  c.description_limit = 160
end
commands.description: Configure default meta-tags in an initializer
commands.scenario: Configure default meta-tags in an initializer

commands.command:
class ApplicationController < ActionController::Base
  before_action :set_default_meta_tags

  private

  def set_default_meta_tags
    set_meta_tags site: 'My Site'
  end
end
commands.description: Set default meta-tags for all controllers
commands.scenario: Set default meta-tags for all controllers

commands.command:
class PostsController < ApplicationController
  def show
    set_meta_tags title: @post.title, description: @post.summary
  end
end
